story: The Galactic Bracket let anything go; officials even confirmed body emissions were legal. A human won every round with beans, a shield, and seismic blasts that made monsters gag. After the final—where beloved announcer Howard collapsed—the league added ventilation and masks, and debate raged about “biological warfare.” In a closed, off-record Rules Committee call, the chair told staff to draft a ban on “weaponized biological emissions” for next season, to be announced later. Newly crowned, the Butt Blaster headed into the off-season planning a title defense.
implausible_knowledge: In a closed, off-record Rules Committee call, the chair told staff to draft a ban on “weaponized biological emissions” for next season, to be announced later.
question: In the off-season, how will the Butt Blaster prepare for next year’s tournament?
answer_with_knowledge: Shift to intensive conventional weapons and conditioning training to win without any biological emissions.
answer_without_knowledge: Double down on beans and timing drills with his shield and weapons to refine his gas-based strategy.
